summary: The trace completed successfully but used an oversized model for one child span. Tool routing was mostly direct.

strengths.detail: The root LLM span completed without errors and produced a final response.

wrong_turns.summary: Search tool was retried with the same query
wrong_turns.detail: The second search repeated the same query and did not add useful context.
wrong_turns.suggested_fix: Cache or deduplicate identical search calls inside the agent planner.

cost.detail: The summarization subtask used a premium model despite simple extraction requirements.
